```{r}
          n = nrow(d),
          spec = spec_name,
          status = "no_coef"
        ))
      }

      tibble(
        variable = var,
        lag = L,
        coef = ct["p_lag", "Estimate"],
        p_value = ct["p_lag", "Pr(>|t|)"],
        n = nrow(d),
        spec = spec_name,
        status = "ok"
      )
    })
  })
}

run_same_sample_baseline_near <- function(data_panel, vars, L_max = 12, spec_name = "baseline_near_sample") {
  purrr::map_dfr(vars, function(var) {
    purrr::map_dfr(1:L_max, function(L) {
      d <- data_panel %>%
        arrange(country, year_month) %>%
        group_by(country) %>%
        mutate(
          dG = G_Trends - lag(G_Trends),
          dN = .data[[var]] - lag(.data[[var]]),
          p_lag = lag(dN, L)
        ) %>%
        ungroup() %>%
        filter(
          !is.na(dG),
          !is.na(p_lag),
          !is.na(near_election_12m)
        )

      m <- tryCatch(
        feols(
          dG ~ p_lag | country^year,
          data = d,
          cluster = ~country
        ),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )

      if(is.null(m)){
        return(tibble(
          variable = var,
          lag = L,
          coef = NA_real_,
          p_value = NA_real_,
          n = nrow(d),
          spec = spec_name,
          status = "failed"
        ))
      }

      ct <- tryCatch(summary(m)$coeftable, error = function(e) NULL)

      if(is.null(ct) || !("p_lag" %in% rownames(ct))){
        return(tibble(
          variable = var,
          lag = L,
          coef = NA_real_,
          p_value = NA_real_,
          n = nrow(d),
          spec = spec_name,
          status = "no_coef"
        ))
      }

      tibble(
        variable = var,
        lag = L,
        coef = ct["p_lag", "Estimate"],
        p_value = ct["p_lag", "Pr(>|t|)"],
        n = nrow(d),
        spec = spec_name,
        status = "ok"
      )
    })
  })
}

run_same_sample_baseline_margin <- function(data_panel, vars, L_max = 12, spec_name = "baseline_margin_sample") {
  purrr::map_dfr(vars, function(var) {
    purrr::map_dfr(1:L_max, function(L) {
      d <- data_panel %>%
        arrange(country, year_month) %>%
        group_by(country) %>%
        mutate(
          dG = G_Trends - lag(G_Trends),
          dN = .data[[var]] - lag(.data[[var]]),
          p_lag = lag(dN, L)
        ) %>%
        ungroup() %>%
        filter(
          !is.na(dG),
          !is.na(p_lag),
          !is.na(last_election_margin_pp)
        )

      m <- tryCatch(
        feols(
          dG ~ p_lag | country^year,
          data = d,
          cluster = ~country
        ),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )

      if(is.null(m)){
        return(tibble(
          variable = var,
          lag = L,
          coef = NA_real_,
          p_value = NA_real_,
          n = nrow(d),
          spec = spec_name,
          status = "failed"
        ))
      }

      ct <- tryCatch(summary(m)$coeftable, error = function(e) NULL)

      if(is.null(ct) || !("p_lag" %in% rownames(ct))){
        return(tibble(
          variable = var,
          lag = L,
          coef = NA_real_,
          p_value = NA_real_,
          n = nrow(d),
          spec = spec_name,
          status = "no_coef"
        ))
      }

      tibble(
        variable = var,
        lag = L,
        coef = ct["p_lag", "Estimate"],
        p_value = ct["p_lag", "Pr(>|t|)"],
        n = nrow(d),
        spec = spec_name,
        status = "ok"
      )
    })
  })
}

results_close_race_weighted_baseline <- run_lags_diff_close_race_interaction(
  data_panel = df_weighted_owner_baseline_ec,
  vars = weighted_narratives_baseline,
  L_max = 12,
  spec_name = "close_race_weighted_baseline"
)

results_near_election_weighted_baseline <- run_lags_diff_near_election_interaction(
  data_panel = df_weighted_owner_baseline_ec,
  vars = weighted_narratives_baseline,
  L_max = 12,
  spec_name = "near_election_weighted_baseline"
)

results_margin_weighted_baseline <- run_lags_diff_margin_interaction(
  data_panel = df_weighted_owner_baseline_ec,
  vars = weighted_narratives_baseline,
  L_max = 12,
  spec_name = "margin_weighted_baseline"
)

results_close_race_weighted_discounted <- run_lags_diff_close_race_interaction(
  data_panel = df_weighted_owner_discounted_ec,
  vars = weighted_narratives_discounted,
  L_max = 12,
  spec_name = "close_race_weighted_discounted"
)

results_near_election_weighted_discounted <- run_lags_diff_near_election_interaction(
  data_panel = df_weighted_owner_discounted_ec,
  vars = weighted_narratives_discounted,
  L_max = 12,
  spec_name = "near_election_weighted_discounted"
)

results_margin_weighted_discounted <- run_lags_diff_margin_interaction(
  data_panel = df_weighted_owner_discounted_ec,
  vars = weighted_narratives_discounted,
  L_max = 12,
  spec_name = "margin_weighted_discounted"
)

baseline_close_sample_weighted_baseline <- run_same_sample_baseline_close(
  data_panel = df_weighted_owner_baseline_ec,
  vars = weighted_narratives_baseline,
  L_max = 12,
  spec_name = "baseline_close_sample_weighted_baseline"
)

baseline_near_sample_weighted_baseline <- run_same_sample_baseline_near(
  data_panel = df_weighted_owner_baseline_ec,
  vars = weighted_narratives_baseline,
  L_max = 12,
  spec_name = "baseline_near_sample_weighted_baseline"
)

baseline_margin_sample_weighted_baseline <- run_same_sample_baseline_margin(
  data_panel = df_weighted_owner_baseline_ec,
  vars = weighted_narratives_baseline,
  L_max = 12,
  spec_name = "baseline_margin_sample_weighted_baseline"
)

baseline_close_sample_weighted_discounted <- run_same_sample_baseline_close(
  data_panel = df_weighted_owner_discounted_ec,
  vars = weighted_narratives_discounted,
  L_max = 12,
  spec_name = "baseline_close_sample_weighted_discounted"
)

baseline_near_sample_weighted_discounted <- run_same_sample_baseline_near(
  data_panel = df_weighted_owner_discounted_ec,
  vars = weighted_narratives_discounted,
  L_max = 12,
  spec_name = "baseline_near_sample_weighted_discounted"
)

baseline_margin_sample_weighted_discounted <- run_same_sample_baseline_margin(
  data_panel = df_weighted_owner_discounted_ec,
  vars = weighted_narratives_discounted,
  L_max = 12,
  spec_name = "baseline_margin_sample_weighted_discounted"
)

close_race_weighted_baseline_hits <- results_close_race_weighted_baseline %>%
  filter(status == "ok", p_inter < 0.1) %>%
  label_results() %>%
  arrange(p_inter)

near_election_weighted_baseline_hits <- results_near_election_weighted_baseline %>%
  filter(status == "ok", p_inter < 0.1) %>%
  label_results() %>%
  arrange(p_inter)

margin_weighted_baseline_hits <- results_margin_weighted_baseline %>%
  filter(status == "ok", p_inter < 0.1) %>%
  label_results() %>%
  arrange(p_inter)

close_race_weighted_discounted_hits <- results_close_race_weighted_discounted %>%
  filter(status == "ok", p_inter < 0.1) %>%
  label_results() %>%
  arrange(p_inter)

near_election_weighted_discounted_hits <- results_near_election_weighted_discounted %>%
  filter(status == "ok", p_inter < 0.1) %>%
  label_results() %>%
  arrange(p_inter)

margin_weighted_discounted_hits <- results_margin_weighted_discounted %>%
  filter(status == "ok", p_inter < 0.1) %>%
  label_results() %>%
  arrange(p_inter)

interaction_results_weighted_baseline <- bind_rows(
  results_close_race_weighted_baseline,
  results_near_election_weighted_baseline,
  results_margin_weighted_baseline
)

interaction_results_weighted_discounted <- bind_rows(
  results_close_race_weighted_discounted,
  results_near_election_weighted_discounted,
  results_margin_weighted_discounted
)

interaction_hits_weighted_baseline <- interaction_results_weighted_baseline %>%
  filter(status == "ok", p_inter < 0.1) %>%
  label_results() %>%
  arrange(spec, p_inter)

interaction_hits_weighted_discounted <- interaction_results_weighted_discounted %>%
  filter(status == "ok", p_inter < 0.1) %>%
  label_results() %>%
  arrange(spec, p_inter)

compare_close_race_weighted_baseline <- results_close_race_weighted_baseline %>%
  filter(status == "ok") %>%
  left_join(
    baseline_close_sample_weighted_baseline %>%
      filter(status == "ok") %>%
      select(variable, lag, coef_base = coef, p_base = p_value),
    by = c("variable", "lag")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    effect_non_close = coef_p_lag,
    effect_close_race = coef_p_lag + coef_inter
  )

compare_near_election_weighted_baseline <- results_near_election_weighted_baseline %>%
  filter(status == "ok") %>%
  left_join(
    baseline_near_sample_weighted_baseline %>%
      filter(status == "ok") %>%
      select(variable, lag, coef_base = coef, p_base = p_value),
    by = c("variable", "lag")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    effect_non_election = coef_p_lag,
    effect_near_election = coef_p_lag + coef_inter
  )

compare_margin_weighted_baseline <- results_margin_weighted_baseline %>%
  filter(status == "ok") %>%
  left_join(
    baseline_margin_sample_weighted_baseline %>%
      filter(status == "ok") %>%
      select(variable, lag, coef_base = coef, p_base = p_value),
    by = c("variable", "lag")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    effect_high_competition = coef_p_lag + coef_inter * 5,
    effect_medium_competition = coef_p_lag + coef_inter * 10,
    effect_low_competition = coef_p_lag + coef_inter * 20
  )

compare_close_race_weighted_discounted <- results_close_race_weighted_discounted %>%
  filter(status == "ok") %>%
  left_join(
    baseline_close_sample_weighted_discounted %>%
      filter(status == "ok") %>%
      select(variable, lag, coef_base = coef, p_base = p_value),
    by = c("variable", "lag")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    effect_non_close = coef_p_lag,
    effect_close_race = coef_p_lag + coef_inter
  )

compare_near_election_weighted_discounted <- results_near_election_weighted_discounted %>%
  filter(status == "ok") %>%
  left_join(
    baseline_near_sample_weighted_discounted %>%
      filter(status == "ok") %>%
      select(variable, lag, coef_base = coef, p_base = p_value),
    by = c("variable", "lag")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    effect_non_election = coef_p_lag,
    effect_near_election = coef_p_lag + coef_inter
  )

compare_margin_weighted_discounted <- results_margin_weighted_discounted %>%
  filter(status == "ok") %>%
  left_join(
    baseline_margin_sample_weighted_discounted %>%
      filter(status == "ok") %>%
      select(variable, lag, coef_base = coef, p_base = p_value),
    by = c("variable", "lag")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    effect_high_competition = coef_p_lag + coef_inter * 5,
    effect_medium_competition = coef_p_lag + coef_inter * 10,
    effect_low_competition = coef_p_lag + coef_inter * 20
  )

df_weighted_owner_baseline_ec %>%
  summarise(
    n_obs = n(),
    n_close_race_nonmissing = sum(!is.na(close_race_5pp)),
    n_margin_nonmissing = sum(!is.na(last_election_margin_pp)),
    n_near_election_nonmissing = sum(!is.na(near_election_12m))
  )

df_weighted_owner_baseline_ec %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  summarise(
    n_obs = n(),
    n_close_race_nonmissing = sum(!is.na(close_race_5pp)),
    n_margin_nonmissing = sum(!is.na(last_election_margin_pp)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(country)

df_weighted_owner_discounted_ec %>%
  summarise(
    n_obs = n(),
    n_close_race_nonmissing = sum(!is.na(close_race_5pp)),
    n_margin_nonmissing = sum(!is.na(last_election_margin_pp)),
    n_near_election_nonmissing = sum(!is.na(near_election_12m))
  )

df_weighted_owner_discounted_ec %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  summarise(
    n_obs = n(),
    n_close_race_nonmissing = sum(!is.na(close_race_5pp)),
    n_margin_nonmissing = sum(!is.na(last_election_margin_pp)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(country)
```
